product_surfaces: cmd/gitcode-mcp/main_test.go::TestCLIStartupPlanSelectsLiveProvider/SCN-CLI-LIVE-SYNC-MISSING-CREDENTIAL exercises the real CLI startup route for gitcode-mcp sync --live with no GITCODE_TOKEN and no injected credential source, asserting typed missing_credential failure and zero httptest.Server requests.

cmd/gitcode-mcp/main_test.go::TestCLIStartupPlanSelectsLiveProvider/SCN-CRED-LIVE-WRITE-MOCK-KEYCHAIN exercises the real CLI create-issue --live route with GITCODE_TOKEN unset and a mocked Keychain-equivalent provider, asserting the mocked GitCode server receives an authenticated create request and no fixture read-only/token leakage appears.

cmd/gitcode-mcp/main_test.go::TestCLIStartupPlanSelectsLiveProvider/SCN-CRED-DOCTOR-LIVE-MOCK-KEYCHAIN exercises the real CLI doctor --live --format json route with the same mocked credential seam, asserting provider_mode live-http, credential source mock-keychain, cache path, API base URL, zero server requests, and no token leakage.
go test ./... is run by run.sh as the offline acceptance gate so these CLI integration scenarios remain executable under the repository-wide test command.
freshness: Current target runtime at validation execution time with fresh temporary config/cache paths created by Go tests and no live GitCode credentials, live network access, or OS Keychain access.

mocks_used.httptest.Server: Mocks only the external GitCode-compatible HTTP service and records request counts/auth headers while exercising production CLI startup, doctor, sync, and write routes.
mocks_used.GITCODE_MCP_TEST_KEYCHAIN_TOKEN: Test-only mocked Keychain-equivalent credential source injected through the credential provider seam; token material is unset for GITCODE_TOKEN and must not appear in command output or doctor JSON.

validation_scope: Validation artifacts are limited to tests/design_package/002-credential-resolution-task-1-resolver-result-unifies-live-credentials/. No production source, production docs, runtime code, server code, app code, root AGENTS.md, or product configuration is modified by this validation materialization.

live_validation.reason: Live validation is disabled for this task. All evidence is deterministic offline validation using stubbed external dependencies only.
